reviews_list.review_title: A place to graduate as a great and infalliable physician.

review_content.Placements: College is provided with management and government quota seats for admission procedure. Our college provides post graduation courses too along with under graduate course of Bachelor of homoeopathic medicine and surgery (BHMS). And also provided with well equipped hospital and managing staff.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college having various labs for thorough study of each and every subject, of our curriculum. Like wise, anatomy labs with well maintained viscera and bones with other required equipments. Also provide digital classrooms with Wi-Fi favolities. And having central library which getting updated with new publications and editions.

faqs.question: What all courses are offered by GITAM Deemed to be University Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: GITAM Deemed to be University Hyderabad offers UG and PG programmes in Engineering, Management, Pharmacy, Science, Architecture, and others. At the UG level, the university offers BTech, BSc, BBA, BA, BArch, BPharma, and other courses. At the PG level, the university offers MSc, MTech, MBA, MA, MPharma, and other programmes offered to the students.

college_info.intro:
GITAM University Hyderabad comprises of 7 departments, including Technology, Management, Pharmacy, Architecture, and others. BTech and MBA are the popular programmes offered at the university.
GITAM Deemed to be University - Hyderabad Campus offers a full-time, four year BTech programme at the UG level. The institute offers BTech programme across various specialisations like Aeropspace Engineering, Civil Engineering, CSE, Artificial Intelligence & Data Science, and others. The MBA programme offered by the GITAM University Hyderabad is a two-year programme. Below mentioned are the GITAM Deemed to be University Hyderabad popular programmes:

placements.overview:
GITAM Deemed to be University - Hyderabad Campus placements 2025 has not been released yet. The placement drive for the 2024 season at GITAM School of Technology Hyderabad has ended, but the placement report is still pending. In contrast, the NIRF report has been published. A total of 2,262 students achieved placements during GITAM School of Technology Hyderabad placements.

Out of all the students placed 2,200 were from BTech and BPharma program and 62 belonged to MTech. The median salary package for BTech graduates was INR 4.80 LPA, while for MTech graduates, it was INR 4.60 LPA.

faqs.answer: A:    BTech fee at GITAM Deemed to be University, Hyderabad is between INR 5.5 Lacs to INR 16.47 Lacs for full course duration, depending on the specialisation chosen in this course.

faqs.answer: A:    GITAM Deemed to be the University Hyderabad has not disclosed the application fee for the MBA program. But to apply for the MBA program, the candidates are required to take the GITAM Business Aptitude Test (GBAT) or any of the following national-level entrance tests CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, or JEMAT. The MBA programme fees at GITAM Hyderabad lie between INR 1,80,000 and INR 4,97,000  The prospective students should get in touch with the university's admissions office for further details on the application fees and all other questions related to admissions.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It has great infrastructure and an average faculty. Placements are improving.

review_content.Placements: Placement rate is good. The highest package offered is 15 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 3.2 LPA. The average package offered ranges from 4.5-5 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Google, Amazon, Cognizant, etc., hire students. The top role offered is HR. Our college provides internship programs and hackathons to participate in, which will be helpful for students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. Good quality of facilities is provided, but it can be better in terms of food. The hostel food is not as good as it should be. It provides everything, but the taste of the food is not good. We can eat it. The college conducts sports events.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It offers a good environment and quality education. It is a bit expensive.

review_content.Placements: According to me, the placement ratio is somewhat less because the college is private. Some good companies from Hyderabad come and select a few students. For good students, many internship programs are available through the campus. If we do well in internships, we will get a good placement at the end of the course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities available in the classrooms are basic. Some of them have air-conditioners, and some of them just have normal fans. As it is a private university, we have to pay for the luxury, and the same happens in the hostel. However, everything is well-maintained and clean.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It's a good college, best campus.

review_content.Placements: 85 percent of students got placements in companies like Dr. Reddy, Cipla, Sun Pharma, etc. Packages range from 3 LPA to 7 LPA. 70 to 80 percent of students got internships. Basically, top roles after B.Pharma include options like drug inspector, medical and pharmaceutical analyst, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is everywhere and very fast. Digital classrooms are available, and some non-AC classrooms are also there. According to hostelers, food is good in both boys’ and girls’ hostels. Medical facilities are available. Sports facilities are good, and clubs are also well managed.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Good college but Visakhapatnam college is better.

review_content.Placements: We got internship opportunities from our professors and HOD. I have done an internship in elevate labs which was online where I did tasks that needed python, SQL, and blue skills. I have done a project related to all these skills. In the 5th semester, the eligibility for campus placement requires 0 backlogs. Verizon was one company that was visited in my course. The highest package was 6 LPA, and average package was 4 LPA. Almost 60 to 70% of the students got the placements. I would like to pursue a master's degree after my degree.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel was good. There were four people in a room where you get your own bed, wardrobe, table, and chair. The meal quality was good, and you had it almost every day. You had a different menu. Wi-Fi was all over the campus. Library was good, and all types of books were available. There was also an e-library. Classrooms were spacious and digitally updated. Labs were spacious and had centralized AC.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It is good on campus because of greenery and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Top MNCs will recruit the students. Based on the students' practical knowledge, they will get a job. Last year in our college, a student got the highest package with 1 crore. Our college also offers to study abroad and to do internships abroad.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel food is really nice, and its hospitality is also nice. According to security purpose, it is really good for girls. Sports are also there, we can play badminton, hockey, cricket, etc. In hostel, there are carrom, chess, and gym facilities are also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It has very good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Top recruitment companies that offer placements at GITAM University Hyderabad are Amazon, Microsoft, TCS, Intel, etc. The highest package offered here at GITAM University Hyderabad is 50 LPA. Average package offered is 9.9 LPA. Percentage of students placed is 71%.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure available here is far better compared to other universities. Here, the rooms are neatly maintained with workers cleaning every day. All the classrooms, library, mess, and all are maintained with air conditioning and everyday cleaning.

faqs.answer: GITAM Deemed to be University Hyderabad offers UG and PG programmes in Engineering, Management, Pharmacy, Science, Architecture, and others. At the UG level, the university offers BTech, BSc, BBA, BA, BArch, BPharma, and other courses. faqs.question: Q: What all courses are offered by GITAM Deemed to be University Hyderabad?

faqs.answer: For GITAM University Hyderabad admissions, candidates need to apply for GITAM GAT exam i. e. the GITAM Admission Test. Candidates can apply by visiting the official website. The institute also accepts the scores of national/ state-level entrance exams for several courses. Moreover, the application fee to apply is INR 1,200. The documents required at the time of admission include Active mobile number and email ID, Scanned photograph in JPEG format (maximum upload size is 50 KB only), Scanned copies of Class 10 & Class 12 marksheets, Scanned copy of Bachelor's degree marksheet (if applicable), Scanned copy of master's degree marksheet (if applicable), Aadhaar Card, Hall Ticket/ Score Card of the national level test, Medical certificate, Physical fitness certificate and No objection certificate from the present employer (for part-time PhD).
faqs.question: Q: How to apply for GITAM University Hyderabad admissions?

faqs.answer: GITAM University Hyderabad admissions is entrance-based. Candidates are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria and clear the entrance exam for admisison. Admission is through the university entrance exam and the college also accepts various entrance exam score, such as NEET, JEE Main, TS EAMCET and others. To get admisison, candidates are also required to visit the university official website to fill out the online application form.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission in GITAM University Hyderabad?

faqs.answer: Yes, it is woth to pursue GITAM Deemed to be University Hyderabad. The university offers scholarships to the deserving candidates. GITAM University Hyderabad is patnwered with eminent universities like Aston University, The university of Nottingham, Elon University, and others. The university is recruited with top companies like Amazon, Adobe, pwc, Cogizant, and others.

review_summary.college_name: GITAM Deemed to be University - Hyderabad Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has great infrastructure and an average faculty. Placements are improving.

content.Placements: Placement rate is good. The highest package offered is 15 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 3.2 LPA. The average package offered ranges from 4.5-5 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Google, Amazon, Cognizant, etc., hire students. The top role offered is HR. Our college provides internship programs and hackathons to participate in, which will be helpful for students.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. Good quality of facilities is provided, but it can be better in terms of food. The hostel food is not as good as it should be. It provides everything, but the taste of the food is not good. We can eat it. The college conducts sports events.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It offers a good environment and quality education. It is a bit expensive.

content.Placements: According to me, the placement ratio is somewhat less because the college is private. Some good companies from Hyderabad come and select a few students. For good students, many internship programs are available through the campus. If we do well in internships, we will get a good placement at the end of the course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities available in the classrooms are basic. Some of them have air-conditioners, and some of them just have normal fans. As it is a private university, we have to pay for the luxury, and the same happens in the hostel. However, everything is well-maintained and clean.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It's a good college, best campus.

content.Placements: 85 percent of students got placements in companies like Dr. Reddy, Cipla, Sun Pharma, etc. Packages range from 3 LPA to 7 LPA. 70 to 80 percent of students got internships. Basically, top roles after B.Pharma include options like drug inspector, medical and pharmaceutical analyst, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is everywhere and very fast. Digital classrooms are available, and some non-AC classrooms are also there. According to hostelers, food is good in both boys’ and girls’ hostels. Medical facilities are available. Sports facilities are good, and clubs are also well managed.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Good college but Visakhapatnam college is better.

content.Placements: We got internship opportunities from our professors and HOD. I have done an internship in elevate labs which was online where I did tasks that needed python, SQL, and blue skills. I have done a project related to all these skills. In the 5th semester, the eligibility for campus placement requires 0 backlogs. Verizon was one company that was visited in my course. The highest package was 6 LPA, and average package was 4 LPA. Almost 60 to 70% of the students got the placements. I would like to pursue a master's degree after my degree.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel was good. There were four people in a room where you get your own bed, wardrobe, table, and chair. The meal quality was good, and you had it almost every day. You had a different menu. Wi-Fi was all over the campus. Library was good, and all types of books were available. There was also an e-library. Classrooms were spacious and digitally updated. Labs were spacious and had centralized AC.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is good on campus because of greenery and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Top MNCs will recruit the students. Based on the students' practical knowledge, they will get a job. Last year in our college, a student got the highest package with 1 crore. Our college also offers to study abroad and to do internships abroad.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel food is really nice, and its hospitality is also nice. According to security purpose, it is really good for girls. Sports are also there, we can play badminton, hockey, cricket, etc. In hostel, there are carrom, chess, and gym facilities are also available.

faqs.answer: The GITAM Deemed to be University has multiple admission options for admission to its B.Arch. course and accepts scores of many entrance exams. faqs.question: What are the documents required for admission to GITAM Deemed to be University Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: The documents required for admission to GITAM Deemed to be University Hyderabad are as follows:-Academic documents- Marksheets of 10th and 12th grade, bachelor's degree, and master's degree (if applicable).Identification documents- Aadhaar card, passport, driving license, voter ID card, PAN card, or school or college ID cardOther documents- Scanned photograph, medical certificate, hall ticket or score card of a national level test, physical fitness certificate (if applicable), and no objection certificate from current employer (for part-time PhD).Students are also required to pay INR 1,200 as an application fee.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for the MBA program at GITAM Deemed to be University Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: GITAM Deemed to be the University Hyderabad has not disclosed the application fee for the MBA program. But to apply for the MBA program, the candidates are required to take the GITAM Business Aptitude Test (GBAT) or any of the following national-level entrance tests CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, or JEMAT.The MBA programme fees at GITAM Hyderabad lie between INR 1,80,000 and INR 4,97,000  The prospective students should get in touch with the university's admissions office for further details on the application fees and all other questions related to admissions.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by GITAM Deemed to be University Hyderabad for admission to B.Arch.?
faqs.answer: To be accepted by GITAM Deemed to be University Hyderabad for admission in B.Arch students need to have the qualifying marks in the GITAM Admission Test (GAT) or the National Aptitude Test in Architecture (NATA). So that meansGAT and NATAexam scores are accepted by GITAM Deemed to be University Hyderabad for admission to B.Arch.Additionally, to be eligible for B.Arch admission, candidates require a minimum of 50% aggregate marks in their Intermediate (10+2) examination or a 10+3 Diploma, with Physics and Mathematics as mandatory subjects.

placement_report.college_name: GITAM Deemed to be University - Hyderabad Campus Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package and Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: GITAM Deemed to be University - Hyderabad Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: GITAM Deemed to be University - Hyderabad has yet to release its full 2025 placement report. However, as per the official website, the highest package offered during GITAM Deemed to be University - Hyderabad placements 2025 was INR 1.4 Crore per annum. Additionally, a total of 334 CSE students were placed during the placement drive. The highest and average package given to CSE students during GITAM Deemed to be University - Hyderabad placements was INR 60 LPA and INR 6.1 LPA , respectively. Further, 33 Pharmacy students were also placed in the 2025 placement drive.

Earlier in 2024, 78% ECE students were placed. In all 52 recruiters took part in the GITAM Deemed to be University - Hyderabad placements 2024 and extended 42 offers to ECE students. The highest and average package recorded for ECE during the 2024 placements were INR 9.1 LPA and INR 4 LPA , respectively.

faqs.question: What are the job opportunities after doing M.A. from GITAM Deemed to be University Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: There are many job opportunities after doing an M.A. from GITAM Deemed to be University Hyderabad you can be a teacher or assistant professor at a college or university or you can pursue your career as a journalist or in public relations. You can also work as a social services specialist to design programs and policies to help people with problems like homelessness, addiction, and poverty. You can be a practitioner in the social science discipline of economics or even a psychologist. Civil services are one of the most common career options after completing an M.A.

reviews.review_heading: Good college but Visakhapatnam college is better.
reviews.review_text: Hostel was good. There were four people in a room where you get your own bed, wardrobe, table, and chair. The meal quality was good, and you had it almost every day. You had a different menu. Wi-Fi was all over the campus. Library was good, and all types of books were available. There was also an e-library. Classrooms were spacious and digitally updated. Labs were spacious and had centralized AC.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by GITAM School of Technology, HyderabadReviewed on 10 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is good on campus because of greenery and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Hostel food is really nice, and its hospitality is also nice. According to security purpose, it is really good for girls. Sports are also there, we can play badminton, hockey, cricket, etc. In hostel, there are carrom, chess, and gym facilities are also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by GITAM School of Technology, HyderabadReviewed on 8 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It has very good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure available here is far better compared to other universities. Here, the rooms are neatly maintained with workers cleaning every day. All the classrooms, library, mess, and all are maintained with air conditioning and everyday cleaning.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by GITAM School of Technology, HyderabadReviewed on 7 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is very good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure available here is far better compared to other universities. The rooms are neatly maintained with workers cleaning every day. All the classrooms, library, and mess are maintained with air conditioning and cleaned daily.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by GITAM School of Business, HyderabadReviewed on 3 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with campus and faculty, good placements, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Gitam offers Wi-Fi enabled classrooms known as smart classrooms. Classrooms, well equipped labs, and a central library with digital resources. Hostels are comfortable with Wi-Fi, the mess provides decent food, canteens add variety, and facilities include medical care.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by GITAM School of Technology, HyderabadReviewed on 22 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: GITAM has a holistic kind of environment where students can study stress free.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities available in our campus, including Wi-Fi, computer labs, Library, playgrounds, and clubs. The facilities at the hostel are too good, including sports facilities, a gym, a medical room, a hostel library, and nicely furnished rooms. The quality of food is good in our hostel canteens.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by GITAM School of Technology, HyderabadReviewed on 21 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: 2025 GITAM Hyderabad CSE review.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, AC classrooms for university courses, and a vast library with thousands of books available for reading.  The hostel is good, but a little on the expensive side. The food is good in college hostels compared to other colleges. Canteen food is also delicious. A sports ground is available for playing.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by GITAM School of Technology, HyderabadReviewed on 16 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied, really good infrastructure with well-maintained equipment.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in my college are really good and well-maintained. We are provided with all the required things for our course. We have well-working Wi-Fi, AC classrooms with projectors, AI, and 360 degree cameras for better monitoring of students. The food in our college is the best. We have many varieties of food, and they are hygienic.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by GITAM School of Technology, HyderabadReviewed on 16 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of GITAM University, Hyderabad.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. All department course infrastructure is good. The college provides Wi-Fi 24 hours a day. Labs are advanced. Classrooms are good. The library is very big and has all types of books. The hostel is good. Food is decent. In college, there are 3 canteens. Good facilities for medical and sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by GITAM School of Technology, HyderabadReviewed on 29 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Balanced experience: Decent teaching, good events, and scope for industry upgrades.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. We have well-equipped labs, reliable Wi-Fi, clean classrooms, and library with good collection of books. Hostel rooms are neat and maintained regularly. Mess food has variety dishes with good taste. Sports facilities include a box cricket, indoor games. Basic medical help is available all time.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by GITAM School of Technology, HyderabadReviewed on 5 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: All over good faculty members, average placements, good infrastructure, and bad food in hostel.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is good. Labs are fabulous. Classrooms are good, few are AC and few are non-AC. Wi-Fi is the issue nearby. Hostel is worse. Non taste food, common washrooms, no games, and medical is okay. The mess and canteen should improve a lot.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by GITAM School of Technology, HyderabadReviewed on 2 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My review of GITAM Hyderabad.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms are well-equipped with Wi-Fi routers, projectors, and smart CCTV cameras with AI detection technology to detect cheating in exams. The library is 3-floored and has almost everything we will need for our studies. It also has a separate workplace for digital work. The hostel is a bit expensive but good. It is comfortable with regular cleaning and attentive staff members. Mess food is relatively much better than other private colleges with delicious and a vast variety of meals. Howev...

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Overall good college where you come just for studies.

review_content.Placements: It's a new college and the first internship started this year and going well. The stipend is Rs. 13,900 only as such no placements are offered at this moment. College started its first batch in 2020, so there is a first batch doing internships here. Management is better not best.
review_content.Infrastructure: College building is under construction. Hostels are good better than some of the government colleges. Hospital patient loads are average. Library for self-study which is open from 8:00 AM to 10:00 PM. Wi-Fi facility is available. The quality of food is not good in the hostel but the rooms are better and well-maintained. Labs have the proper equipment. There is a cafe and a canteen in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Mahaveer Institute of Medical Sciences and Research.

review_content.Placements: I am in 2nd year. There are only 4 batches that have been admitted to the college. The first batch of 2020 is going to do internships this year and in a month they will start the internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are good and maintained. It has 2 seater rooms with attached bathrooms. The college is still under construction, and the whole thing is not built yet. The hostel is also under construction. The campus does not have an auditorium or gym. For sports, there is no ground.
review_content.Faculty: The college is academic-oriented only. They are strict with their studies and want the focus to remain on academics only. Teachers pay attention to performance in college exams and tests. They are very strict with attendance and 75% is a must to appear in final exams. The NMC-guided course curriculum is followed in the college and they teach accordingly.

faqs.answer: Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.
faqs.question: Q: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?

faqs.answer: H. P. Government Dental College And Hospital, Shimla has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMDSCandidate must have secured 50 percentile (40 in case of SC/ST/OBC, including PWD of SC/ST/OBC & 45 in case of UR PWD candidates) in NEET- MDS 2023.BDSCandidate must have passed in Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Biotechnology, and English individually and must have obtained mentioned percentage taken together in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology/Biotechnology. In respect of PwBD candidates as per NMC and DCI Regulations, the minimum marks in the qualifying examination in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology (or Botany & Zoology)/Biotechnology taken together shall be 40% instead of 50%. Candidates who have passed Class 12 from Open School or as private candidates shall not be eligible to appear for theNational Eligibility Cum Entrance Test'. However, this has been a subject matter of challenge before the Hon'ble High Court of Delhi, Hon'ble High Court of Allahabad, Lucknow Bench, and Hon'ble High Court of Madhya Pradesh at Jabalpur The lower age limit is 17 years on or before 31st Dec of the year of admission (born on or before 31.12.2006) Result awaited candidates can also apply.UG DiplomaCandidate must have completed 10+2 from any recognised Board/Council.

Candidate must have passed in Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Biotechnology, and English individually and must have obtained mentioned percentage taken together in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology/Biotechnology. In respect of PwBD candidates as per NMC and DCI Regulations, the minimum marks in the qualifying examination in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology (or Botany & Zoology)/Biotechnology taken together shall be 40% instead of 50%.
Candidates who have passed Class 12 from Open School or as private candidates shall not be eligible to appear for theNational Eligibility Cum Entrance Test'. However, this has been a subject matter of challenge before the Hon'ble High Court of Delhi, Hon'ble High Court of Allahabad, Lucknow Bench, and Hon'ble High Court of Madhya Pradesh at Jabalpur
The lower age limit is 17 years on or before 31st Dec of the year of admission (born on or before 31.12.2006)
Result awaited candidates can also apply.
Candidate must have completed 10+2 from any recognised Board/Council.

placements.overview: According to the details available on the official website of Nitte Institute of Physiotherapy, the institute is in a practice of organising the placement drive every year for their meritorious students. NIPT Mangalore organised a campus placement drive for interns in association with Physioedge Group, Goa in January, last year. However, Nitte Institute of Physiotherapy placement statistics have not been released on the official website, the same will be updated here once available.

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
Nitte Institute of Physiotherapy courses are divided into four categories such undergraduate, postgraduate, certificate courses and PhD. However, each category has its different eligibility criteria and fees structure. For UG students, Nitte College of Physiotherapy offers a Bachelor in Physiotherapy (BPT) program with a duration of 4.5 years (including 6 months compulsory internship).

Apart from this, NIPT also offers a PhD program in various disciplines such as Medicine, Dentistry, Pharmacy, Nursing, Biological Science, Physiotherapy, and many more. Below are some of the Nitte Institute of Physiotherapy courses and their fee structure:

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for physiotherapy with good patient exposure.

review_content.Placements: We got patient exposure during our 2nd year, so we observed the patient's condition and treatment for the same. After completing 4 years, we have internships at KS Hegde Medical Hospital for 6 months. We do not get paid for the same.
review_content.Infrastructure: It provides modern and spacious classrooms with projectors and whiteboards. There is a well-stocked library with quiet study space. There are outdoor fields for sports like cricket and football. There are separate hostels for both males and females with good facilities. High-speed Wi-Fi and mental health centers are also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Nitte Institute of Physiotherapy review.

review_content.Placements: There are many future opportunities in this field, and our role in the medical field is increasingly important. There are more opportunities outside India, and you can earn more in another country. Nitte is a very popular and good college in Bangalore.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library is very good, with a good selection of books that are useful for students. There are four or five labs that are very useful for students to learn or gain practical knowledge. Wi-Fi is available, and the hostel food is good.

review_summary.college_name: Nitte Institute of Physiotherapy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My college life at the Nitte Institute of Physiotherapy.

content.Placements: At Nitte Institution of Physiotherapy, we have a good campus selection option, and 90% of students get placements based on their performance. The placement package may vary from company to company but there is no less package below 1 LPA. It has better career options.
content.Infrastructure: Nitte Institute of Physiotherapy has the best infrastructure. Classrooms provided are very spacious with high-quality projectors and a Wi-Fi facility. The library is very wide. We can get any books from the library, and we can sit and study the whole day there. The hostel facility has in built mess facilities also. There is an indoor stadium and outdoor ground. We have our own college hospital where the medical facilities are free for students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with this college, in my opinion.

content.Placements: About 100 students are there in my class for the bachelor of physiotherapy course. The overall experience is good in this college. College also has a hospital that provides internship opportunities for students in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is very near to college in this area. There is just a 200-meter difference between college and hostel. The quality of hostel, infrastructure, and hospitality is average. Mess is also average.
content.Faculty: Faculty members of our college are very extraordinary. They are very helpful to us and are there with us in every situation and help us when we need them. Our mentors are also helpful whenever we need them or if we are stuck in anything. Semester exams are pretty tough in this college, but we all are making through it.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for physiotherapy with good patient exposure.

content.Placements: We got patient exposure during our 2nd year, so we observed the patient's condition and treatment for the same. After completing 4 years, we have internships at KS Hegde Medical Hospital for 6 months. We do not get paid for the same.
content.Infrastructure: It provides modern and spacious classrooms with projectors and whiteboards. There is a well-stocked library with quiet study space. There are outdoor fields for sports like cricket and football. There are separate hostels for both males and females with good facilities. High-speed Wi-Fi and mental health centers are also available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Nitte Institute of Physiotherapy review.

content.Placements: There are many future opportunities in this field, and our role in the medical field is increasingly important. There are more opportunities outside India, and you can earn more in another country. Nitte is a very popular and good college in Bangalore.
content.Infrastructure: The library is very good, with a good selection of books that are useful for students. There are four or five labs that are very useful for students to learn or gain practical knowledge. Wi-Fi is available, and the hostel food is good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A better college or medical student.

content.Placements: Among 170+ students for the academic year 2019-20, 85% of the eligible candidates are placed across specializations like Finance, Marketing, HR, and Banking services. The highest package is 12 LPA. The lowest package is 5 LPA and the average package is 6 LPA. Top recruiters were Deloitte Consulting, Grant Thornton, KPMG, and South Indian Bank. Around 50% of students have earned internships. The top roles offered during the placements were Supervisor, Executive, and Analyst.
content.Infrastructure: At nitte, it is a great learning experience. It has all facilities on campus. Academics are also very good. The faculty members are so cooperative and supportive. They work hard for us and always welcome everyone to ask anything and discuss any problems one has. Our college has a rich library and a good big lab. The campus is amazing. There are a lot of events and fests and workshops conducted throughout the session which are really interesting and especially career counseling sessions.

admission_process.title: NITTE Institute of Physiotherapy Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: NITTE Institute of Physiotherapy admissionis merit-based. The Institute provides UG and PG programs and the courses offered byNitte Institute of Physiotherapyare Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT), Master of Physiotherapy (MPT), PhD and Certificate courses in Yoga. Admission to this institute is merit-based. The mode of application is online based. Students looking to join the institute need to first make sure that they qualify for the programme by fulfilling the eligibility. Interested candidates can read the following article to know all about the programmes, selection criteria, and admission process for NIPT.

Candidates interested in getting into the NITTE Institute of Physiotherapy are required to follow the NITTE Institute of Physiotherapy application process. Admission into the undergraduate programme is made based on Class 12  marks, while graduation is required for PG admissions. The institute provides the programmes in full-time and regular mode. Check out the below table for details onNITTE Institute of Physiotherapy courseswhich is inclusive of its eligibility & selection:

NIPT course admissionsfor all of its courses are done based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The process mainly commences online. Aspiring candidates can visit the official website of the institute and fill out the admission enquiry form. For a step-by-stepNITTE Institute of Physiotherapy admission process, students can follow the steps listed below:
Step 1: Application
The mode of application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill out the online application form.
Step 2: Selection rounds:
Appear for the institute-level selection rounds and then wait for the release of their results.
Step 3: Admission confirmation:
Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the institution.

courses_data.name: NITTE Institute of Physiotherapy BPT Admission 2025
courses_data.description: NITTE Institute of Physiotherapy Mangalore offers BPT at the undergraduate level. The course duration of the programme is four years including six months of rotating internship compulsory for all the students. NIPT Mangalore BPT admission is merit-based. Course Name Eligibility Criteria BPT A pass in Class 12 or equivalent examination approved by NITTE with not less than 40% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry and Biology, with English being one of the languages of study

faqs.question: What is the duration of BPT course at NITTE Institutes of Physiotherapy?
faqs.answer: The duration of BPT course is four and half years (including 6 months of compulsory internship). To be eligible for BPT course candidate should pass in class 12 standard with not less than 40% marks aggregate in Physics, Chemistry and Biology with English as one of the languages of study.

courses_data.name: NITTE Institute of Physiotherapy MPT Admission 2025
courses_data.description: NITTE Institute of Physiotherapy also offers MPT programme in five different specialisations at PG level. The course duration of the programme is two years. Candidates must be physically fit at the time of admission and must obtain a medical certificate duly signed from a gazetted medical officer. Selection criteria:Admission to MPT is based on scores obtained in the last qualifying examination, followed by a PI round. MPT Specialisation Eligibility Criteria Obstetrics and Gynecology Candidates must have a BPT degree from a recognised institute/ university Neurological and Psychosomatic disorders Musculoskeletal disorders and Sports Physiotherapy Cardio-respiratory disorders and intensive care Paediatrics Physiotherapy

faqs.question: What are the specialisation offered under the MPT course at NITTE Institutes of Physiotherapy?
faqs.answer: The specialisation offered under the MPT course at NITTE Institutes of Physiotherapy are listed below:Physiotherapy in Neurological & Psychosomatic DisordersPhysiotherapy in Musculoskeletal DisordersSports PhysiotherapyPhysiotherapy in Cardio-respiratory Disorders & Intensive CarePaediatric PhysiotherapyPhysiotherapy in Obstetrics & GynecologyCommunity Physiotherapy

faqs.question: Are admissions open at NITTE Institute of Physiotherapy?
faqs.answer: Yes,NITTE Institute of Physiotherapy admissions are currently open. Interested students can visit the official website of the institute and fill out the admission enquiry form to clear any queries. The institute offers two programmes namely BPT and MPT at the UG and PG levels respectively. Admission to both courses is merit-based. Interested candidates need to fulfil the basic eligibility before applying.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: The most disciplined dental college in Maharashtra.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides good placement opportunities to students after completion of the course. Students from our village opt for post graduation after completing their course. The stipend offered is Rs. 1,500 per month which is low compared to PG fellowship stipend which is much higher. Almost 90% of the students after completing bachelors do internship from college only.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is spread over around 140 acres. The campus has a medical college, a dental college, a nursing college, one ayurvedic college and 2 high schools. It's 8 km away from the city of Wardha, and our dental college is considered to be the 2nd best dental college in Maharashtra. Our college provides free Wi-Fi facility all over the campus. A food court is available where people love to hang out.

review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are provided like Wi-Fi in hostel rooms, and the mess food is good as well. Labs are available and can accommodate 100+ students. A cafeteria is also present in the food court. Medical insurance is also provided. Sports events are also held. The library is available, with all books accessible in hard copy and online as well.

reviews.review_heading: Sharad Pawar Dental College And Hospital is a good college to pursue a dental course.
reviews.review_text: There is a state of the art infrastructure and facilities. There are food court facilities available in the college. There is Wi-Fi enabled in the college, and there are skill labs. There are frequently updated books in the library with journals available. There is separate annexure with devoted OTs and wards with dedicated paramedical staff.

reviews.review_heading: The most disciplined dental college in Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: The campus is spread over around 140 acres. The campus has a medical college, a dental college, a nursing college, one ayurvedic college and 2 high schools. It's 8 km away from the city of Wardha, and our dental college is considered to be the 2nd best dental college in Maharashtra. Our college provides free Wi-Fi facility all over the campus. A food court is available where people love to hang out.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with my decision to choose this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are provided like Wi-Fi in hostel rooms, and the mess food is good as well. Labs are available and can accommodate 100+ students. A cafeteria is also present in the food court. Medical insurance is also provided. Sports events are also held. The library is available, with all books accessible in hard copy and online as well.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good for academics only.

review_content.Placements: Not many patients are seen coming here since it's a private college but the patient flow is still not too low. Not every department here is filled with patients. Clinical exposure is fair. Students are taken to the hospital from the first year as part of the CBME programme in accordance with the ECE program, which is called 'early clinical exposure' to make the students familiar and comfortable with the hospital environment.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is well developed with research labs and simulation centers. However, it lacks amenities like Wi-Fi even in the library, except in the digital library, where the computers have access to the internet. The library in SIMS is the central library for the whole Shridevi Group of institutions.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college.

review_content.Placements: Almost 90% of students passed exams and did internships. There will be no placements in the MBBS course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides all facilities for students. All facilities are average compared to other colleges. The food served in the mess is not good. Many students prefer to eat and stay outside of our college.
review_content.Faculty: All teachers are doctorates, well-qualified, and helpful. The course curriculum is relevant and has improved its clinical knowledge. Internal exams are good and are not difficult to pass. The pass percentage is 50%.

overview_faqs.answer: Shridevi Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Hospital is a distinguished institution offering MBBS, MD, MS. Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Medicine & Health Sciences field. Shridevi Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Hospital is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. Shridevi Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Hospital has received an impressive review rating of 3.4 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 3.5 for Campus Life, 3.5 for Placements, 4 for Faculty, and 3 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Shridevi Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The campus is dissatisfied.

content.Placements: This is the best course, and UG students get a minimum of 80,000. Recruitments happen in top hospitals. Nowadays, this profession is mostly treated as a business. Of course, I prefer business rather than service, but humanitarian grounds should be prioritized when serving patients.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels life is average with minimum administrative support. Wi-Fi facility is there, but the hostel food is the worst we have experienced. But, the accommodation facilities are better compared to other colleges.
content.Faculty: The semester exams are good, and the pass percentage is 90%. In medical courses, not everyone can pass. The syllabus is completed on time by the best teachers, and they conduct tests based on the completion of the syllabus. I prefer this campus only for its teaching. The teaching faculty members offer the best quality of education.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A good college life but I am dissatisfied with the mess food.

content.Placements: Around 10% of students got internships in the same college. The top role offered is doctors.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. We have a college building near to the hospital which makes easy transportation facility. We have a badminton ground. We have a library in our college building. Our college provides separate classrooms for individual batchmates. The hostel is good but the food offered is very bad and is unsatisfactory.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful. The course curriculum is very relevant. We are given three internals in a year and 1 final exam, since it's a medical course the question paper is very much difficult. Teachers are the best. They are well-qualified.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good for academics only.

content.Placements: Not many patients are seen coming here since it's a private college but the patient flow is still not too low. Not every department here is filled with patients. Clinical exposure is fair. Students are taken to the hospital from the first year as part of the CBME programme in accordance with the ECE program, which is called 'early clinical exposure' to make the students familiar and comfortable with the hospital environment.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus is well developed with research labs and simulation centers. However, it lacks amenities like Wi-Fi even in the library, except in the digital library, where the computers have access to the internet. The library in SIMS is the central library for the whole Shridevi Group of institutions.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college.

content.Placements: Almost 90% of students passed exams and did internships. There will be no placements in the MBBS course.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides all facilities for students. All facilities are average compared to other colleges. The food served in the mess is not good. Many students prefer to eat and stay outside of our college.
content.Faculty: All teachers are doctorates, well-qualified, and helpful. The course curriculum is relevant and has improved its clinical knowledge. Internal exams are good and are not difficult to pass. The pass percentage is 50%.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Shridevi Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Hospital.

content.Placements: There are average placements. They don't give stipends for interns.
content.Infrastructure: The main issue is hostels, where no cleanliness is maintained, and the food is subpar. There is a shortage of equipment. There is no ground for any sports activities. The campus has to be developed, especially the hostels.
content.Faculty: Experienced lecturers are teaching well, but the problem is with tutors, who are still learning to be experienced and efficient. Attendance is a must and should be taken seriously. Tests will be given at regular intervals, and the practicals will go smoothly.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Very good faculty, infrastructure is not so good, all the other facilities are well provided.

review_content.Placements: It has 150 seats for MBBS, and besides that, the college also offers nursing and paramedical courses. Internships are paid. There are no recruiting companies because cracking NEET PG is necessary for recruitment. The college encourages USMLE and FMGE.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is a downside; the college lacks great infrastructure. However, it does have a basketball court and a large ground for celebrations. Hostel rooms are nice, but there is no Wi-Fi, and geysers are available outside the rooms. The gym is good, and the mess serves above-average food. Classrooms are well-lit, and labs have sufficient supplies for everyone. The college campus includes a large auditorium for indoor celebrations.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements, satisfied with faculty and faculty members provided .

review_content.Placements: Our course is good. Opportunities are more in our college and The students ability places a major role. Lecturing is good. The knowledge they give us is unpredictable. Placements are very easy for our friends. MBBS and PG in 13 different branches. The passed out students from our college can get a job in good hospitals with a good salary packages.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our infrastructure is good. The facilities are also good. The faculty provide us what we offer. Mess and canteen is good. Food is good. No issues in food. We have enjoyed sports, that our faculty will conduct games daily. The quality of food is good in our college, the quality of food avail in the canteen is also good and tasty. In hostel we don't have any Wi-Fi facility. Our Library have calm environment and have many good books to refer for quality of information.

individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is a good college. Hospital postings are useful as we need more practical knowledge.

content.Placements: I'll be passing out in 2027 from the management batch. I came to study at this college from Mumbai last year. Only new courses are started in B.Sc. Allied health sciences. After completion of the course, we can continue our internship as well as our freshers' duty in this college only.
content.Infrastructure: There are many classrooms. Each department has classrooms and demo rooms. Wi-Fi is available in the hospital premises. Hostel food is okay. Besides, many hostels are available, which are good enough. Many students come easily and go back to the hostel. It is a good college.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: MBBS college with a mix of everything.

content.Placements: We generally don't get and don't expect placements in MBBS colleges but according to NMC, a one-year internship should be provided for each student studying in every medical college in India and our college fulfilled this requirement successfully. Every student is provided with a one-year internship, which gives them enough exposure to the clinical side of the MBBS, which is pretty useful during their practice.
content.Infrastructure: Coming to infrastructure, our campus is not as grand as every other old private medical college present in Telangana; it is not too vast but not to closely paced for you to feel claustrophobic. Our classrooms are sufficiently ventilated and well lit. Hostels are pretty good compared to the ones at other colleges. There is also enough space for recreation ( like basketball courts, badminton courts, etc.). The library also provides every book you need and provides space that makes us think outside the box. The food is usually okay.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Very good faculty, infrastructure is not so good, all the other facilities are well provided.

content.Placements: It has 150 seats for MBBS, and besides that, the college also offers nursing and paramedical courses. Internships are paid. There are no recruiting companies because cracking NEET PG is necessary for recruitment. The college encourages USMLE and FMGE.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is a downside; the college lacks great infrastructure. However, it does have a basketball court and a large ground for celebrations. Hostel rooms are nice, but there is no Wi-Fi, and geysers are available outside the rooms. The gym is good, and the mess serves above-average food. Classrooms are well-lit, and labs have sufficient supplies for everyone. The college campus includes a large auditorium for indoor celebrations.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good placements, satisfied with faculty and faculty members provided .

content.Placements: Our course is good. Opportunities are more in our college and The students ability places a major role. Lecturing is good. The knowledge they give us is unpredictable. Placements are very easy for our friends. MBBS and PG in 13 different branches. The passed out students from our college can get a job in good hospitals with a good salary packages.
content.Infrastructure: Our infrastructure is good. The facilities are also good. The faculty provide us what we offer. Mess and canteen is good. Food is good. No issues in food. We have enjoyed sports, that our faculty will conduct games daily. The quality of food is good in our college, the quality of food avail in the canteen is also good and tasty. In hostel we don't have any Wi-Fi facility. Our Library have calm environment and have many good books to refer for quality of information.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A holistic college for student growth.

content.Placements: Our MBBS placements are all based on your own ability to work for long hours and your skill in the work. SVS provides skilled-based education for sure. They have new technology which will help you be on par with your competition. There are many patients which always is a benefit.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of SVS is not too huge. Compared to any other medical college in Telangana, it has a very restricted college area. The hostels are pretty good. The room's bathrooms are very clean and maintained. Cleaning is done every day. The hostel fee is very affordable too. We also have washing machines and laundry services available.

Candidates fulfiling the eligibility requirements can apply for admission. Aspirants can fill out the application form online or offline at the campus. Candidates have to pay an application fee of INR 1,000 via any of the online payment modes to apply for admission.

college_info.college_name: Presidency University Powered by Emversity Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Students under the International Scholarship Programme by Presidency University Powered by Emversity can avail 100% tuition fee waiver. Marwadi University /Marwadi Education Foundation Group of Institutions offers categories of scholarship to international students. Selected students get 100% waiver on the tuition fee and only need to pay for accommodation and food.

The total course fee for BSc ay Presidency University Powered by Emversity is INR 7.2 lakh. Candidates need to pay IN 30,000 as seat booking amount at the time of admission. Aspirants opting for hostel facility need to pay an annual hostel fee ranging between INR 1.45 lakh and INR 2 lakh. Besides, candidates must pay the application fee of INR 1,000 in the start to register for the course.

review_content.Placements: The present student in the course is 30. The highest, lowest and average package offered in the course is 40000-19lacks. Himalaya and some clinical companies are giving best packages. Most of the student get internship in hospital near to our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good infrastructure to support students' futures, as well as a well-equipped campus with Wi-Fi. There are both offline and online libraries available. Hostels are excellent, and not all of the food is delicious.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied with the facilities available in our college.

review_content.Placements: Almost every year, about 100 students take admission to this college. Various urban-based companies visit this college and offer jobs. Generally, a salary package of around 2 LPA-3 LPA is offered for jobs. Companies like Sun Pharma, Wipro, etc., visit here. Almost 80% of students used to get internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is also available here, and the accommodation is also perfect. Labs are also quite good and usable. Classrooms are cleaned. The library facility is available here in which every student can borrow 3 books. Medical emergency facilities are also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college in Bangalore for pharma courses with excellent infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are attractive and great as most of the people got placed. Almost 60% of the students got placed in the previous year. The college has good tie up and exposure with pharmaceutical companies. It is a great place to study and has a friendly campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure of our college is good, and all facilities are available here. There are a well-equipped central library and department laboratories. Classrooms are well-organised. Hostel facilities are well-organised. There are good cafeteria and canteen which serves healthy and fresh food. It has a great and safe environment to hang on with everyone.

review_summary.college_name: Department of Pharmacy, Sumandeep Vidyapeeth University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: This university provides great facilities for your future.

content.Placements: According to the rules of Pharmacy Council of India, there are 30 students in our batch. As of now, our college provides fewer placements at different pharmaceutical companies. They are still working on it. From our batch, many students got internships in various hospitals as clinical pharmacists and junior research assistants. Students also got internships in various research-related areas.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a great infrastructure. It has many open lawns. We have a huge learning resource center, which is a central library for all the courses. It has a wide range of books related to healthcare and management. All departments have their own separate libraries. We also have great Wi-Fi service all over the campus. Moreover, our hostels have great facilities for boys and girls. The mess serves great food. We also have a multispeciality hospital on campus for medical needs.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides very good faculty members.

content.Placements: The highest salary offered is Rs.40,000 per month from companies like Zydus, SunPharma, etc. The lowest salary is Rs.17,000 per month and the average salary is Rs.25,000 per month. Top recruiting companies are SunPharma, Cipla, and Zydus.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good with facilities like projectors, CPU, keyboard, mouse, monitor, and benches with comfortable chairs. Wi-Fi is available on campus with a fee of Rs.100 per year. Practical labs are available in our college. The quality of the food served is delicious.

individual_reviews.title: Our college is very good.

content.Placements: The highest salary offered by Zydus and SunPharma is Rs. 40,000 per month. The average salary offered is Rs. 25,000 per month. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 18,000 per month. The salary packages will increase according to the work and experience. Top recruiting companies are Sun Pharma, Cipla, Divi's Laboratories, and Zydus. Around 25% of students got internships in companies like Cipla, Sun Pharma, Alembic Pharma, Rice Pharmaceutical, and Liquid Oral.
content.Infrastructure: Our classroom is good and equipped with a projector, a CPU, a keyboard, a mouse, a monitor, and benches. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. Wi-Fi cost is Rs.100 per year. The food served in the mess is delicious. Our college has practical labs.

individual_reviews.title: I would like to recommend this college to other medical students.

content.Placements: The salary package offered was 1.75 LPA. Top roles offered were clinical research, medical communication, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our department was good. Free Wi-Fi was available in classrooms and the library. Our hostel had air conditioning and Wi-Fi. Mineral water was also available.
content.Faculty: Teachers were friendly. They helped with our studies by conducting extra classes. They were very useful. They were like our parents.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with good campus life.

content.Placements: Placements were not as accurate as they show in the developing stages. You must do it yourself. Placements were not granted. Mostly 2-3 students were placed due to good marks.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, labs were average. Classrooms were good but not air-conditioned. The library was the best and most peaceful. Wi-Fi was available all over the campus. Canteens were average and Nescafe was good. Places to socialise were less compared to other colleges in competition but were pretty average.
content.Faculty: Exams were easy and one can easily clear semester exams which were easy. Exams were conducted slower than other universities as they have 6 months gap between other colleges. Students become industry-ready as they provide good knowledge. The quality of teaching was good. Teachers were helpful.

reviews.review_heading: This university provides great facilities for your future.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a great infrastructure. It has many open lawns. We have a huge learning resource center, which is a central library for all the courses. It has a wide range of books related to healthcare and management. All departments have their own separate libraries. We also have great Wi-Fi service all over the campus. Moreover, our hostels have great facilities for boys and girls. The mess serves great food. We also have a multispeciality hospital on campus for medical needs.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides very good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good with facilities like projectors, CPU, keyboard, mouse, monitor, and benches with comfortable chairs. Wi-Fi is available on campus with a fee of Rs.100 per year. Practical labs are available in our college. The quality of the food served is delicious.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Our classroom is good and equipped with a projector, a CPU, a keyboard, a mouse, a monitor, and benches. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. Wi-Fi cost is Rs.100 per year. The food served in the mess is delicious. Our college has practical labs.

reviews.review_heading: I would like to recommend this college to other medical students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department was good. Free Wi-Fi was available in classrooms and the library. Our hostel had air conditioning and Wi-Fi. Mineral water was also available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good campus life.
reviews.review_text: In our college, labs were average. Classrooms were good but not air-conditioned. The library was the best and most peaceful. Wi-Fi was available all over the campus. Canteens were average and Nescafe was good. Places to socialise were less compared to other colleges in competition but were pretty average.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I am satisfied with placements and good teachers of this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. A good hostel is also available on campus for boys and girls. Mess is also available on campus and mess food is average. A library is available on campus and is open for 24 hours. There are many sports competitions organised by our department.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with the great faculty members and nice infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is a good infrastructure in this college. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled with high-speed. Labs have good facilities and also have research lab in the college. The classrooms are spacious, and about 100 students can fit in class along with the projectors. There is a central library which has a great collection of books. There is cultural activity every year.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Department of Pharmacy, Sumandeep Vidyapeeth University.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are good. The food served in the mess is good. Around 2 boys' hostels and 4 girls' hostels are available in our college. They provide a PG hostel for boys. The mess facility is available in the hostel. The food served in the mess is good. They serve vegetarian food items.

reviews.review_heading: The placements were good in 2017.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available for this course/department were good. The labs were in good condition and hygienic. Wi-Fi was available and the classrooms were good and hygienic. The library had a study environment every time. The quality of facilities in the hostel was good and the quality of food available in the mess or canteen was good. The medical facilities were also available. There were many sports and games available on campus.

review_summary.college_name: SUT Academy of Medical Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Really a nice and student-friendly campus.

content.Placements: A batch consists of about 100-150 students. It varies according to NMC regulations per year. The MBBS course is for 4.5 years which includes classroom learning and a one-year internship. Our college provides internships to all students who complete MBBS here. There are no campus placements in this college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. There is a student-friendly campus. The hostel is awesome. It can accommodate 3 students per room. The mess is clean and hygienic. Bathrooms are good. Washing machines and laundry facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College only for study; Infrastructure is average.

content.Infrastructure: There is no playground. No college trip. No quality food. The principal and teachers always ask us to study. No entertainment. College life is poor. College does not provide extracurricular activities.
content.Faculty: My teachers are good. 50 is the pass percentage. There is no revaluation for us. No re-totaling because of digital valuation. The evaluation is too tight. Students get year back when they fail by 1 mark
content.Other: The administration is too bad. No college trip, fun, entertainment, etc.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It provides good placements for 2016, and average infrastructure.

content.Placements: Around 80-90% of students are placed in various sectors of the community serving as high-rated doctors, cardiology, neurology, ortho, pediatrics, pulmonology, general physician, etc. The course offers high-rated academic and clinical exposure that is reflected in graduates.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers average facilities and infrastructure for efficient clinical and laboratory skills. The quality of facilities in the hostel is average and not worthy of the money deposit. Sports and games are not much entertained because of the lack of ground and playable area. Medical facilities are normal.

individual_reviews.title: I suggest you opt for a better college, but it is not so bad too.

Students who pass the final university exams are easily placed in high sector institutions.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided by the college are below average. Wi-Fi connectivity is provided in both the college and hostel compounds. Classrooms are decently arranged for efficient study purposes. The quality of food provided varies, but on average, it requires attention.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I would recommend students to take admission in it.

content.Placements: Around 80-85% of students passing out from this college work under esteemed institutions in universities for their post-graduation purposes. The roles that the course offers mainly vary from cardiology, neurology, psychiatry, dermatology, gastroenterology, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are average in comparison to other colleges in the same state. The development in the college now is in expanding phase. High-speed internet Wi-Fi is provided in both the hostel and campus premises. The laboratories, classrooms, and library are efficiently exploited by the students. Students are provided with average quality of food in the canteen and mess. Sports and games are average.

reviews.review_heading: College only for study; Infrastructure is average.
reviews.review_text: There is no playground. No college trip. No quality food. The principal and teachers always ask us to study. No entertainment. College life is poor. College does not provide extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good placements for 2016, and average infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college offers average facilities and infrastructure for efficient clinical and laboratory skills. The quality of facilities in the hostel is average and not worthy of the money deposit. Sports and games are not much entertained because of the lack of ground and playable area. Medical facilities are normal.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest you opt for a better college, but it is not so bad too.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by the college are below average. Wi-Fi connectivity is provided in both the college and hostel compounds. Classrooms are decently arranged for efficient study purposes. The quality of food provided varies, but on average, it requires attention.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend students to take admission in it.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are average in comparison to other colleges in the same state. The development in the college now is in expanding phase. High-speed internet Wi-Fi is provided in both the hostel and campus premises. The laboratories, classrooms, and library are efficiently exploited by the students. Students are provided with average quality of food in the canteen and mess. Sports and games are average.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good placements and a good environment for academics.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure provided are of average quality, and the hostel provides Wi-Fi connectivity. Classes are well-equipped with up-to-date lecture theatres, and good seating facilities. The food available is of good quality, and the canteen provides good options. Sports and games are daily events and equipped with minimum equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Not a bad decision for me at all.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well oriented to work under normal conditions. The college provides working class equipments in labs and dissection halls and there are enough cadavers for the same purpose. The college provides facilities for reading as in reading rooms and libraries.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There are adequate facilities available in this college such as seminar hall, lecture halls for classes etc. High-speed Wi-Fi is available for study purposes of students. A canteen is available on campus, which is open from 8 am to 10 pm. Inside the hostel, there is a gym for workouts.

Apart from these courses, the flagship courses at KLU are BTech, BCA, and MTech among many others. BTech graduates of KL University work in various industries, including software development, IT consulting, and data science at top-tier firms.
MTech programme at KL University, Andhra Pradesh is offered across various Engineering and Science disciplines, including Computer Science, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Robotics and Automation, Chemical Engineering, Machine Design, and Biotechnology. faqs.question: Can I get into KL College of Law without entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    No, KL University’s admission is based on entrance exams followed by a personal interview round. The university conducts five entrance exams for multiple streams which include KLEEE (Koneru Lakshmaiah Engineering Entrance Examination), KLMAT (Koneru Lakshmaiah Management Admission Test), KLECET (Koneru Lakshmaiah Engineering Common Entrance Test, KLHAT (Koneru Lakshmaiah Humanities Aptitude Test), and KLSAT (Koneru Lakshmaiah Science Aptitude Test). Candidates must score well in the KLU entrance exam to secure seats for engineering, humanities, sciences, management, and lateral entry to engineering programs.
faqs.question: Can I get a seat at KL University without appearing in any entrance exam?

The accepted entrance exams are CLAT, Andhra Pradesh PGLCET, and others. Candidates applying through CLAT must first register for the CLAT exam. Then with valid CLAT scores, visit the official website and apply for admissions. Fill out the application form with pay the application fee.
