overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at KL University?
overview_faqs.answer: KL University MBA fee varies depending on the specialisation. It ranges from INR 5.6 lakh - INR 20 lakh. For a standard MBA, the annual fee is INR 4.5 lakh. If you’re considering the MBA in FinTech, the annual fee is INR 5 lakh, and for the MBA in Global Management, it’s INR 10 lakh per year.

review_summary.college_name: KL University Guntur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with good faculty.

content.Placements: I am studying B. Tech in KL University, CSE, passing out in 2027. The highest is 48 LPA and the lowest is 4 LPA. Some big companies are visiting shortly. Our management conducts campus recruitment training classes for students on DSA by smart Interview vendors. They conduct weekly exams.
content.Infrastructure: Good facilities with Wi-Fi and excellent infrastructure in classrooms, labs, and library. All books are available in the library. We have excellent labs and lab faculty, who will teach you clearly with practical experience. We also have digital boards in every class.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best step ever I took.

content.Placements: From the BCA department, nearly 90 percent of the students are in CRT. The top recruiting companies that come for BCA are Accenture, IBM, Cap Gemini, Cognizant and other top companies are there in the list. Top roles for students from BCA are mostly Data Analyst, Associate Analyst, and secured other roles in AI. The highest package is 25 LPA, the average package is 15 to 20 LPA, and the lowest package is 6 to 8 LPA. As the majority of the students get placements some of the students will get internships at a starting percentage of 95 percent.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms and campuses, everything is perfect like Wi-Fi it is available 24/7, even if there is any problem, the technical department resolves it within an hour. Everything is neat and hygienic. There are sports clubs to encourage students, food is good not like home food, canteens are good, and prices are reasonable. We have a big Central library where we can find nearly every book that a student wants. Infrastructure is like Eye Fest for the students, it gives a pleasant mood for everyone in the university.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Information Technology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is good for those who don’t want to waste money and time. This college is excellent.

content.Infrastructure: It has good infrastructure and games. It is a 100-acre college, also known as the Greenary College. The college is full of green trees and gardens. This college has great nature and trees, and all games are available in the college, so don’t worry about games.
content.Faculty: Faculty are excellent. My course has 3 semesters per year. It is an experiential learning course for four years, which is a very good course. In this college, faculty have good skills; they are from IITs, NITs, and some have PhDs. They help always, not only during college time, but all the time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Internet of Things (IoT) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: 50 percent of students get placed. The lowest package offered is 3.6 LPA. The top role offered is a software developer. Some of the students got internship offer letters from ECE. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Cognizant, LTI, and Mindtree.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, library, and auditorium are available. Hostels are good. The library is too good, and helpful books are available. The quality of food available in the canteen is worthless. The cost is high. The quality, quantity, and taste of the bad is too bad.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. Hons. with EA - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with overall college.

content.Placements: Every year, on average 95 percent students are placed. The highest package till this year we got is 23 LPA. The average package offered is between 6 to 10 LPA. KPMG, Deloitte, Dupoint and PWC and many more big companies come for placements. Most of the students got internships. The roles offered are finance intern audit roles and many.
content.Infrastructure: The lab is well equipped. The Wi-Fi and AC are running 24/7 and the classrooms are also in good condition and the library has all the books which are really helpful. The quality of food is very good. The food in the canteen is healthy they do not provide harmful food to the students.

admission_process.title: KL University, Vijayawada Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: KL (Deemed to be University) Vijayawada admission 2025is currently open for various courses. The university offers courses, such as BTech, BBA, BSc, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers doctorate and MPhil courses. To get admitted to KLU, Vijayawada, candidates must meet the eligibility requirement of the preferred course. The university offers more than 25 courses in various streams such as Engineering, Management, Science, etc. The application process atKL (Deemed to be University) Vijayawadais conducted online or offline. Read the article to know more aboutKL (Deemed to be University) Vijayawadacourse admission2025.

KLU, Vijayawada admission 2025is entrance-based. The university also accepts national-level entrance exam scores such as GATE, MAT, NATA etc. for admission to specific courses.KL (Deemed to be University) Vijayawadaoffers 25 courses at the UG and PG levels in multiple streams like Engineering, Management, Science etc. Check out the following table for details aboutKL (Deemed to be University) Vijayawada course admissions2025:
Particulars
KLU, Vijayawada Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from various sources on the internet. Hence, is indicative.

KLU, Vijayawada courses' admissions are based on entrance exam scores. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularKL (Deemed to be University) Vijayawada courses:
Class 12 with a 60% aggregate with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics (PCM)
Class 12 with a 55% aggregate
Class 12 with a 55% aggregate
Graduation with a 55% aggregate
Class 12 above 60% aggregate
Class 12 with a 60% aggregate and 60% aggregate in PCM/PCB
BTech with 55% aggregate

KL (Deemed to be University) Vijayawada admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at KLU, Vijayawada is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: KLU, VijayawadaApplication Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Aspirants must apply online at the official website for UG, PG and PhD courses for admission to the various programme. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website. The application fee for UG, PG and PhD courses are INR 1,000 and INR 1,100, respectively.
STEP 2: Selection

The university considers various entrance exam scores such as KLAT +Interview, KLMAT/MAT/CAT/Any State/National Level specific Management Entrance Tests, KLEEE and NATA etc for admission to the BBA, MBA, BArch among courses. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

After the release ofKLU, Vijayawada cutoff,aspirants with scores equal or above the cutoff are offered seats. The university also releases a merit list based on the composite scores of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted candidates must appear for document verification. Hereafter, pay theKL (Deemed to be University) Vijayawada feeto confirm their seats in the university.

KL (Deemed to be University) Vijayawada offers 25 courses at the UG and PG levels in multiple streams like Engineering, Management, Science etc.

faqs.question: Are admissions at KL College of Engineering, KL University, Guntur open?
faqs.answer: KL University accepts applications in both online and offline modes. Admission to all the courses is entrance exam-based, along with the performance of the candidates in the interview. The university allows the students whom ever qualified in KLEEE/ KLUBSAT JEE Main CAT/ XAT/ APICET etc. , for various courses. Candidates with valid JEE Main or Andhra Pradesh EAMCET Exam scores will be exempted from university-based entrance tests. Moreover, such applicants must satisfy the KL University EAMCET Cut off criteria. There is also a provision for KL University Direct admission.

faqs.question: How costly is KLU Guntur?
faqs.answer: The overall fees depend on the course that a student wishes to pursue. Students can check KL University, Vijayawada's fee structure in the table provided below: Course Tuition Fees BE/BTech 5.7 L – 10.4 L ME/MTech 2.4 L – 2.8 L MBA/PGDM 5.6 L – 20 L Apart from the tuition fee, there are other fee components too that are charged by KLU, including application fee, hostel fee, exam fee, etc. KL University offers hostel facilities too, ranging from INR 63K to INR 71K in two installments. The overall cost of living in Guntur, Andhra Pradesh depends on the lifestyle choices and accommodation preferences of the students.

faqs.question: How many offers are made during KL College of Engineering placements?
faqs.answer: A total of 109 offers were made during KL College of Engineering placements 2024 for Mechanical Engineering branch. Apart from this, 2023 and 13 offers were made during BTech CSE and M.Tech CSE placements 2024, respectively.

faqs.question: How costly is KL University Guntur?
faqs.answer: KL University Guntur offers UG and PG course in various specilisations, such as Engineering, Science, Arts, Management, and others. The fee ranges between INR 1.6 lakh - INR 18 lakh. The fee structure is inclusive of multiple components including caution deposit, exam fee, tuition fee, and more.

highlights.description: KL (Deemed to be University) is one of the most popular institutes of the country. Most of the ranking bodies have recognised this institute as one of the popular choices among students. The institute has been ranked #46 by the NIRF 2025 under the category Overall, #26 under University, #35 under Engineering, and #70 under Management. The institute has been ranked well by eminent ranking bodies because of its curriculum, infrastructure and well-qualified faculty. Students can check the article in this space for more details around the KL (Deemed to be University) rankings.

rankings.highlight: Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Andhra Pradesh In 2025

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, KL (Deemed to be University) outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. KL (Deemed to be University)'s rankings in 'Overall' category have shown a fluctuating trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, KL (Deemed to be University) fell 6 ranks to #46 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'University' category have shown a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, KL (Deemed to be University) fell 4 ranks to #26 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The 'Engineering' category rankings of the institute have shown a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, KL (Deemed to be University)'s rank is #35, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is noticeable that in the 'Innovation' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the past year. In 2025, KL (Deemed to be University)'s rank is #11, the same as last year's rank in the 'Innovation' category by the NIRF ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: KL University Guntur Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
KL University has separate hostels for girls and boys with well furnished rooms and modern amenities. The overall atmosphere is very conducive for the students to concentrate on studies and research. A state of the art kitchen and spacious dining area has been provided for all the hostels.
There are 2 hostels for girls, one is in the campus and one is off campus.University has 7 hostels for boys 2 is in the campus and 5 is off campus.

library.description:
The Central Library of KLEF holds a large number of materials to serve the whole KLEF community. It holds materials relevant to the Engineering, Science & Humanities courses offered by the KLEF, and includes Agricultural Engineering, Pharmacy, Law and specialist books and journals.
The library system contains more than one lakh and fifty thousand books, and five hundred hard copy of periodicals on all subjects related to the teaching and research interests of the KLEF staff and students. The library has over 21,300 electronic journal titles, academic databases and about 30 lakhs eBooks which includes World E-Books Collection. Access is available on campus on student computers and remotely.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by KL College of Engineering, KL UniversityReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities with Wi-Fi and excellent infrastructure in classrooms, labs, and library. All books are available in the library. We have excellent labs and lab faculty, who will teach you clearly with practical experience. We also have digital boards in every class.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Department of Computer Applications, KL University, GunturReviewed on 8 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Best step ever I took.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and campuses, everything is perfect like Wi-Fi  it is available 24/7, even if there is any problem, the technical department resolves it within an hour. Everything is neat and hygienic. There are sports clubs to encourage students, food is good not like home food, canteens are good, and prices are reasonable. We have a big Central library where we can find nearly every book that a student wants. Infrastructure is like Eye Fest for the students, it gives a pleasant mood for everyon...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by KL College of Engineering, KL UniversityReviewed on 27 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is good for those who don’t want to waste money and time. This college is excellent.
reviews.review_text: It has good infrastructure and games. It is a 100-acre college, also known as the Greenary College. The college is full of green trees and gardens. This college has great nature and trees, and all games are available in the college, so don’t worry about games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by KL College of Engineering, KL UniversityReviewed on 24 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, library, and auditorium are available. Hostels are good. The library is too good, and helpful books are available. The quality of food available in the canteen is worthless. The cost is high. The quality, quantity, and taste of the bad is too bad.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by KL College of Commerce, KL University, GunturReviewed on 21 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with overall college.
reviews.review_text: The lab is well equipped. The Wi-Fi and AC are running 24/7 and the classrooms are also in good condition and the library has all the books which are really helpful. The quality of food is very good. The food in the canteen is healthy they do not provide harmful food to the students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by KL College of Engineering, KL UniversityReviewed on 18 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Really good campus and with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: We have all the top-notch facilities like Wi-Fi, furniture, food tables, classrooms with smart boards and highly qualified professionals. The hostels have very good infrastructure, a good environment and very good food. Also have both AC and non-AC facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by KL College of Engineering, KL UniversityReviewed on 15 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure, supportive faculty and strong placement opportunities at KL University.
reviews.review_text: The CSE department has well equipped computer labs, smart classrooms, high speed Wi-Fi, and access to a central digital library with extensive learning resources. Hostels are well maintained with good security, medical facilities, sports infrastructure, and the mess and canteen provide hygienic and decent quality food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by KL College of Engineering, KL UniversityReviewed on 12 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good placement support and decent campus life, but it needs better faculty.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is great, every room has Wi-Fi, and there are many rooms, such as a game room, clubhouse, and study room. It even has a swimming pool, a library is great and really cool, it boosts the study morale, and also there are so many games you can play.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by KL College of Engineering, KL UniversityReviewed on 12 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The campus is good and large, but there are strict rules and almost no exposure.
reviews.review_text: The hostels are very good, and the infrastructure is also very good when compared to any other college, but the fuller utilisation of the infrastructure is still needed. There are clubs for exposure, but the clubs do not have a lot of infrastructure. There is Wi-Fi nearly everywhere, but do note that only an Airtel SIM works here, so get your sim card changed.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by KL College of Engineering, KL UniversityReviewed on 12 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with the hostel life.
reviews.review_text: The college hostel and the environment are too good. The hostel life is not that good because it is too strict. The food in the hostel is also not that good, and they will give us good food for 1or 2 days after the admission. Sports facilities are good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by KL College of Engineering, KL UniversityReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Faculty members and the infrastructure are good. Placements are satisfying.
reviews.review_text: The college has good labs, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. Hostel rooms are clean and basic, with decent mess food and medical help. Sports and indoor games facilities are available on campus. The hostel facilities are decent, and rooms are clean. Drinking water and electricity backup are available. The mess food is average but hygienic. The canteen offers better options.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by KL College of Engineering, KL UniversityReviewed on 29 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good college with best placement record.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well-ventilated and spacious. It has well-structured laboratories with a campus-wide range of Wi-Fi, ensuring connectivity throughout the college grounds. The food is good enough in the mess, and so are the canteens. That is all for this.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by KL College of Engineering, KL UniversityReviewed on 29 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good university with best placements.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled with high-speed internet access, allowing students to work on projects, access online resources, and collaborative efficiently. Multiple well-equipped computer labs with the latest configurations and licensed software for programming, data analytics, cloud computing, networking, AI/ML, and cybersecurity. Specialized labs include AI & Machines learning lab, cloud and big data lab, red hat certified lab, IoT, & embedded systems lab.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by KL College of Engineering, KL UniversityReviewed on 29 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It’s too good college with all the facilities for students.
reviews.review_text: The campus provides all facilities such as washrooms, a library, modern labs, and a dedicated research center. There is also a startup hub that helps students work on new ideas. There are labs for computer science, biotech, and space-related clubs like cinematic, research, space, and startup clubs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by KL College of Engineering, KL UniversityReviewed on 29 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good college placements and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is excellent at KL University in Guntur. It had Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, modern labs, a digital library, and smart-learning facilities. Hostels are well-maintained and provided clean rooms, 24/7 Wi-Fi, and good security. The mess food is decent and had multiple menu options. The canteen is clean and affordable. The campus also offered good medical services and sports facilities for both indoor and outdoor games.

college_info.college_name: KL University Guntur

data.description: As per Shiksha reviews, students have rated the faculty 4.2 out of 5 . The faculty at KL University either hold PhD degrees or are pursuing their PhD, with a maximum of them holding a PhD with experience of over 15 years. With more than 1400 faculty members , it becomes helpful for the students to approach experienced faculty members with ease.

college_info.college_name: Corporate Group of Institutions: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Corporate Group of Institutions is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and B.Pharma. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the Corporate Group of Institutions programmes is around INR 28,500 to 7,98,750.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college. Everyone takes admission if you want to success in your life.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 60% of students are selected for the placement every year. Companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and more multinational companies come to this college, and students get placed. Also, the companies provide work from home for sometimes in any kind of emergency. Placements are quite good.
review_content.Infrastructure: I give 4 out of 5 stars for infrastructure as this college has big buildings and so many classrooms. Every department has a unique classroom like CSE, AIML, etc. It has separate classes. This college also provides many event organisations for entertainment for studies.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: MY insight for college Bhopal .

review_content.Placements: From the third semester, students become eligible for campus placement. Companies like Google, Microsoft, B Pharmaceutical, Pharmacies classes, and Pinna Plus visit our college. The highest average package as per the company offered in our college is 20,00,000 per annum. The percentage of students getting placements is normal, like 60 to 70%. My plans after getting my degree are to start my own business. I will take my own agency and start my business.
review_content.Infrastructure: College provides us with different types of festivals in our college like Garba, Diwali, Holi, Christmas, and New Year. Our library is not that good. I can see that the library is too small, and the books are also not that many. The faculty in class is very strict with the students, but also polite while teaching. In our college, sports and extra activities are not that good. I can't see any sports activities in our college. There are a few trends where social groups and clubs are run by students, and they are getting a lot of followers from the college and influencing a few students as well.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024

faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

review_summary.college_name: Corporate Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It's a good college for the B. Pharmacy.

content.Placements: 60% of students are placed in my course. The highest package is 5 LPA, the lowest package is 2 LPA, and average package is 2.5 LPA - 3.5 LPA. Deloitte is top recruiting company who have visited my college for my course. 50% of students got internships from my course in Accenture. The top most role offered in my course is employed in corporate office.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure related to Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library. All are decent to good, not extraordinary but helpful. Wi-Fi is available for a limited period of time. Library is also good. Classrooms are air-conditioned, and there are good amount of labs also present there. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen in my course is also acceptable, with a good medical support staff and a large ground available for sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Build the concept with quality education and training based on practical things.

content.Placements: Everything is good at this college; having experienced all aspects, I can say that companies like Cognizant, Wipro, TCS, etc., come here. The highest package is approximately 6.5 lakhs per annum and is totally based on your skills. All departments are available, and I have chosen the AI & ML branch.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are equipped with all the necessary facilities and are well-ventilated and digitally facilitated. You need not worry about any aspect of the campus infrastructure, as water purifiers and coolers are installed on every floor.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college. Everyone takes admission if you want to success in your life.

content.Placements: Approximately 60% of students are selected for the placement every year. Companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and more multinational companies come to this college, and students get placed. Also, the companies provide work from home for sometimes in any kind of emergency. Placements are quite good.
content.Infrastructure: I give 4 out of 5 stars for infrastructure as this college has big buildings and so many classrooms. Every department has a unique classroom like CSE, AIML, etc. It has separate classes. This college also provides many event organisations for entertainment for studies.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: MY insight for college Bhopal .

content.Placements: From the third semester, students become eligible for campus placement. Companies like Google, Microsoft, B Pharmaceutical, Pharmacies classes, and Pinna Plus visit our college. The highest average package as per the company offered in our college is 20,00,000 per annum. The percentage of students getting placements is normal, like 60 to 70%. My plans after getting my degree are to start my own business. I will take my own agency and start my business.
content.Infrastructure: College provides us with different types of festivals in our college like Garba, Diwali, Holi, Christmas, and New Year. Our library is not that good. I can see that the library is too small, and the books are also not that many. The faculty in class is very strict with the students, but also polite while teaching. In our college, sports and extra activities are not that good. I can't see any sports activities in our college. There are a few trends where social groups and clubs are run by students, and they are getting a lot of followers from the college and influencing a few students as well.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I would not recommend this college to students who want good studies.

content.Placements: There is no proper placement cell in this college. They take training and placement fees but do not provide any placement support. No student is placed from the college as no interviews are conducted. There are no packages or recruiting companies. No internships are provided except for one college internship.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is quite good. There is no proper Wi-Fi in labs. Classrooms are also not good. Library is good. Hostel facilities are the worst, and hostel food is very bad.
content.Faculty: No proper exams are conducted. All teachers are biased. Teachers are not good in this college and do not provide proper guidance for course. Faculty also lack teaching quality. This college does not prepare students to be industry-ready, instead, they treat students like working cows. College semester exams feel like giving LKG-level exams.

admission_process.title: Corporate Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs:
Corporate Group of Institutions course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theCorporate Group of Institutionsapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG, PG and Certificate programmes in fields of Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies and Nursing, and more. To know about the eligibility of Corporate Group of Institutions courses, students can visit the website.

Corporate Group of Institutions fee structure consists of caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, and more. The mode of payment for Corporate Group of Institutions fees is online. Interested candidates can check below for more details on Corporate Group of Institutions admission:

reviews.review_text: Life on campus is so good. They celebrate many fests. There is a fest week. They give the name of the week as colorful week. In the fest, different programs are conducted by the college for the students. It is so good. The fee structure for the total amount of one year is 114,000. And the bus fee is 15,000 for those who live in Bhopal. Students living outside Bhopal pay 20,000 bus fee. You pay 114,000 in two installments: the first time you pay 4,500, and the second time you pay 61,000.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Corporate Institute of PharmacyReviewed on 8 Sep 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Corporate group of institutions review.
reviews.review_text: The annual function is conducted, and fest was also conducted in which famous singer Shilpa Rao came to entertain the youth. The range and accessibility of books and journals available in the library are very good. We get availability of all the books. Sports and extracurricular activities are offered on campus, and many WhatsApp groups provide information about them.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Corporate Institute of PharmacyReviewed on 25 Dec 2022)
reviews.review_heading: You should go for pharmacy course in this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not that good. I used to live far from college, my college bus used to come there. Facilites are average too. Laboratories are average too, hostels are present in the campus. Most of the students are from Bihar, Jharkhand, Uttar Pradesh and locals.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Corporate Institute of PharmacyReviewed on 3 Nov 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and good facilities. Placement was neither so good nor so bad.
reviews.review_text: In my college there is a lot of digital facilities like Wi-Fi computer classes, classroom, digital classroom, CCTV camera for security libraries, labs, water cooler, lift, Canteen is also good, hostel is good, play ground, ayurveda plants and garden etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Corporate Institute of Science and TechnologyReviewed on 27 Oct 2022)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of faculty members and good placements in 2019 and previous years.
reviews.review_text: Our facilities and infrastructure were excellent and outstanding. There were labs, classrooms, and a good library. In our college, a hostel was available. The quality of food served in the mess and canteen was good. Medical facilities sports and games were available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Corporate Institute of Science and TechnologyReviewed on 6 Jul 2022)
reviews.review_heading: The positive point for the college is its infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is very good as compared to other colleges. There is no Wi-Fi in the college. Wi-Fi facilities are only available in labs and only for faculty members and staff. Hostel provides us good facilities. Mess food is also not that bad, it's manageable but sports facilities are very poor.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Corporate Institute of Science and TechnologyReviewed on 17 Jun 2022)
reviews.review_heading: My personal experience is that if you do engineering try to take admission in government.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not bad, it is well. The Wi-Fi facilities are available and the classroom is smart. In the hostel some facilities are good but not all facilities are good. Medical facilities are not available and the quality of food is also not good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Corporate Institute of Science and TechnologyReviewed on 8 May 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Our college has nice faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good with Wi-Fi but not in working condition. Classrooms are too cleaned. Labs are available. Library has all the editions with good facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Corporate Institute of Science and TechnologyReviewed on 13 Jan 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Corporate Institute of Science and Technology.
reviews.review_text: I have an amazing experience here. Our college provides good placements.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2017Offered by Corporate Institute of Science and TechnologyReviewed on 23 Sep 2021)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college faculty members, placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There are so many facilities in our course and hostel. There is a separate department for each year student in the 1st year. There is a good library. The campus and hostel are Wi-Fi enabled. The quality of the food served is better than other college hostels. Medical facilities and sports zone areas are also available here.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & A.H.) - Batch of 2030
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied the ambience and faculty are excellent .

review_content.Placements: The placement are usually sure shot, companies visits for the placements you still need to fight government examinations for the government job but still many benefits comes when you choose veterinary as option there. You are allowed to choose ncc which earn you some points in the interviews .
review_content.Infrastructure: Needs to improve the infrastructure the hostels are average campus needs proper light during the night time. Meanwhile the playground is not much bigger needs to improve on that, there is a nice sports auditorium for indoor sports and a seminar hall to hold cultural programs there are fodder fields and also horse riding unit which stands it out from other college .

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & A.H.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has an area of 728 acres and it is the only government veterinary college in Chhattisgar

review_content.Placements: Placement is according to the marks obtained in the veterinary psc exam conducted by vyapam itself. UG and PG both are done. With a gap of 2 years, students get their government job in samvidha I. e. temporary posting. There are varieties of job roles offered if we get a good score on vyapam's exam.
review_content.Infrastructure: Boy's hostel is not that good although a water cooler, refrigerator, and a big 55-inch TV were given that has now been stolen in lockdown. There are 2 students in one room. Almira that are as old as my grandma and tube light and fans are also given. Surprisingly tube light makes more noise than a fan.
